generated_exposure.exposure_text: Just saw a local news report about how our town's emergency response team had to scramble when that chemical spill happened last month. They were understaffed and underfunded - took them forever to get organized. Meanwhile, our taxes keep going up for who knows what. When will our leaders start putting civil defense where their mouth is? #FirstRespondersDeserveBetter #TaxDollarsWasted
